task_description: Fix three issues: 1) Remove all fake/hardcoded data (testimonials, fake stats, fake team members), 2) Make the frontend more vibrant and colorful instead of just dark/black, 3) Make the language switcher actually work with English and Khmer translations

verification.summary: pnpm build passes cleanly - TypeScript compiles, all 29 pages generate successfully. No tests exist in this project. No Dockerfile present.

fixes_applied: Fixed corrupted Khmer translations (removed 'org' fragments from visionText, innovationDesc, valuesDesc, trustDesc, safetyDesc, stayUpdatedDesc)
Added hydration-safe pattern to useTranslation hook using mounted state
Created LocaleEffect component that updates document.documentElement.lang
Added CSS rule to apply Noto Sans Khmer font when html lang is km
Replaced hardcoded 'Sign Up' in mobile sheet with t.nav.signUp translation key
Added signUp key to en.ts and kh.ts
skipped: SSR loss on homepage (issue #4) - acceptable pattern per review instructions
